_readme: ToonVault Story Generation Engine — saved settings. Use generate_professional_story.js to create new stories.

imageSettings.negativePrompt: blurry, low quality, distorted, bad anatomy, extra limbs, watermark, text, logo, nsfw, ugly, deformed

storyDefaults.basePositivePrompt: masterpiece, ultra-detailed Korean manhwa webtoon art, beautiful anime aesthetic, official webtoon style, dynamic composition, dramatic cinematic lighting, highly detailed character design, clean linework, vibrant colors

howToGenerate.step1: Edit generate_professional_story.js — change STORY and EPISODES_DATA
howToGenerate.step4: Story URL will be printed at the end
